dwe_cube.description: Cube.js semantic layer + CubeStore + Milvus vector DB + RAG FastAPI

services.name: CubeJS
services.description: Semantic layer — REST / GraphQL / WebSocket API over your data warehouse

services.name: CubeStore
services.description: Pre-aggregation cache for sub-second query responses

services.name: Milvus
services.description: Vector database for semantic / similarity search

services.name: RAG FastAPI
services.description: Retrieval-augmented generation API backed by Milvus

services.name: dbt-cube-sync
services.description: Syncs dbt models to Cube.js schema definitions automatically

services.name: Application Load Balancer
services.description: HTTP -> HTTPS redirect + HTTPS termination. Configurable as internet-facing or internal (VPC-only) via ALB_INTERNAL secret

services.name: DNS
services.description: Route53 CNAME record pointing to the ALB

services.name: EC2 DNS
services.description: Route53 A record pointing directly to the EC2 instance IP — private IP for internal ALB, public IP for internet-facing

required_secrets.description: AWS access key — Pulumi uses this to provision infrastructure and SSM to redeploy the app
AWS secret key
S3 URL for Pulumi state backend, e.g. s3://my-pulumi-state-bucket
Route53 hosted zone ID (e.g. Z1D633PJN98FT9)
Public DNS name for the Cube API (e.g. cube.myorg.com)
ACM certificate ARN for HTTPS on the ALB (must cover DNS_NAME)
AWS VPC ID where infrastructure is deployed
JSON array of public subnet IDs for the ALB (e.g. ["subnet-aaa","subnet-bbb"])
EC2 key pair name for SSH access
Additional EC2 security group ID to attach (e.g. existing SG with DB/SSM rules)
Security group ID to attach to the load balancer (e.g. internal SG restricting access)
Set to 'true' for internal ALB (VPC-only), 'false' for internet-facing. Default: false
GitLab / GitHub token — EC2 uses this to clone the repo on first boot
Username paired with git_deploy_token for HTTPS clone
Data warehouse driver (postgres | bigquery | snowflake | athena | redshift | trino …)
Data warehouse hostname
Data warehouse port (e.g. 5432 for Postgres)
Data warehouse database / catalog name
Data warehouse username
Data warehouse password
JWT signing secret for Cube.js API — generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
Superset instance URL for dbt-cube-sync
Superset username used by dbt-cube-sync
Superset password for the sync user

optional_secrets.description: Route53 hosted zone ID for the EC2 DNS record (e.g. Z1MHSQZ1OR039Y)
DNS name for the EC2 instance A record. Resolves to private IP (internal ALB) or public IP (internet-facing).
LLM API key (if not using Bedrock)
